layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100 and getting worse. Almost every altcoin on the watchlist is in a downtrend with bearish chart patterns. Bitcoin is holding around $64,000 but altcoins have been bleeding heavily — losing $8.8 billion in a week. While fear often creates future buying opportunities, no coin currently offers a clean setup with favorable risk/reward.
layman_action: Wait on the sidelines. The market is still falling and there's no clear bottom signal yet. Keep cash ready to deploy when fear peaks and charts show genuine reversal patterns.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling risk/reward entry today. BONK has a deeply oversold RSI (31) but Three Black Crows and -2.0 chart bias score signal accelerating downside with no support in sight. TRUMP's RSI at 22 is deeply oversold but the chart bias is -0.7 and risk/reward is only 1.0x. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +18% in 7 days means it's already extended — chasing here carries significant pullback risk. ETH is the most defensible position to watch: RSI approaching oversold, $1,800 clear support, and derivatives resetting could catalyze a bounce, but price is still below all MAs in a downtrend. BTC dominance at 56.4% confirms capital is rotating away from alts. The prudent move is to wait for either ETH to test and hold $1,800 or for fear/greed to capitulate below 20.
risk_factors: BTC must defend $62,500 (per CryptoSlate) — a breakdown would drag all alts significantly lower
Fear & Greed trend is worsening (25 and falling), suggesting capitulation selling may not be over
BTC dominance at 56.4% means alt season is nowhere close — alts will underperform in this regime
watch_list: BTC reaction at $62,500 support — a break below triggers broader market sell-off
ETH holding $1,800 support with volume confirmation over next 48 hours
Fear & Greed index for any spike below 20 (capitulation signal) or reversal above 30 (stabilization)
market_context: The market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with worsening sentiment. BTC is relatively stable at $64K but alts are hemorrhaging — $8.8B lost in a week — and high BTC dominance (56.4%) confirms this is not an environment for aggressive alt positioning.
context_banner: Extreme Fear is building but no clean reversal signal has fired yet — disciplined patience will be rewarded with better entries.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with worsening trend — historically creates buying opportunities but timing entry too early gets punished.
ETH RSI at 39 approaching oversold and TRUMP at 22 deeply oversold, but neither has confirmed a bounce off support yet.
Bitcoin must defend $62,500 as altcoins lose $8.8B in a week — sets up the critical support level to watch for broader market direction.
ETH derivatives reset noted, which could set the stage for a cleaner next move once spot price stabilizes at support.
Most candidates show bearish chart structures (BONK -2.0, TRUMP -0.7, ETH -0.7). Only LDO is bullish (+0.85) but already extended after +18% weekly move.
